description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a Sunday worship service starting between 9:00 and 11:00am that offers a concurrent children’s program for ages 5–10, then add that service and its matching children’s program to a visit plan.
tasks.name: Find a Sunday worship service starting between 9:00 and 11:00am that offers a concurrent children’s program for ages 5–10, then add that service and its matching children’s program to a visit plan.

tasks.instruction: Register for a free weekday class or workshop happening this month that starts after 5:00pm, choosing the earliest available date and completing registration for two attendees with provided contact details.
tasks.name: Register for a free weekday class or workshop happening this month that starts after 5:00pm, choosing the earliest available date and completing registration for two attendees with provided contact details.

tasks.instruction: Request a room reservation for next Wednesday from 7:00–9:00pm for a group of about 10 people, selecting the available room with the lowest maximum capacity that can still accommodate 8–12 people.
tasks.name: Request a room reservation for next Wednesday from 7:00–9:00pm for a group of about 10 people, selecting the available room with the lowest maximum capacity that can still accommodate 8–12 people.

tasks.instruction: Search for sermons on forgiveness from the last six months, sort the results by newest first, and add the three most recent sermons to a watch-later playlist.
tasks.name: Search for sermons on forgiveness from the last six months, sort the results by newest first, and add the three most recent sermons to a watch-later playlist.

tasks.instruction: Find a Saturday volunteer opportunity with a listed time commitment under three hours per week and submit a volunteer interest form for that role using the provided contact information.
tasks.name: Find a Saturday volunteer opportunity with a listed time commitment under three hours per week and submit a volunteer interest form for that role using the provided contact information.
tasks.description: Find a Saturday volunteer opportunity with a listed time commitment under three hours per week and submit a volunteer interest form for that role using the provided contact information.

tasks.instruction: Use the online giving page to create a one-time pledge (no immediate payment) to the youth ministry fund, setting the amount to the highest value you can that does not exceed $25 and submitting it with the provided donor details.
tasks.name: Use the online giving page to create a one-time pledge (no immediate payment) to the youth ministry fund, setting the amount to the highest value you can that does not exceed $25 and submitting it with the provided donor details.

tasks.instruction: In a single Monday–Sunday week, find two community events whose times do not overlap—choosing one that starts in the afternoon and another that begins at least one hour after the first ends—and add both to your saved events list.
tasks.name: In a single Monday–Sunday week, find two community events whose times do not overlap—choosing one that starts in the afternoon and another that begins at least one hour after the first ends—and add both to your saved events list.

tasks.instruction: Choose a pastor whose profile lists marriage counseling as a specialty, then request the earliest available counseling appointment next week between 9:00am and 12:00pm and submit the appointment form with the provided contact information.
